analysis.btc_price_note: BTC fell below $75K support on Apr 20 to ~$74,335 (-1.6% 24h). Iran reimposed Strait of Hormuz controls over weekend, triggering risk-off. Oil surged +5.7% while BTC lagged. $75K described as 'both the milestone and the ceiling' by CoinDesk.
sentiment_key_signals: BTC breaks $75K support -> now resistance after weekend geopolitical shock
Iran closes Strait of Hormuz: oil +5.7%, BTC -1.6% (energy-driven risk-off)
Bearish flag pattern on 3-day chart (potential bear trap signal from Apr 14 failed breakout)
rsETH bridge exploit: 116,500 rsETH drained (~18% circulating supply), Aave/SparkLend/Fluid emergency freezes
RaveDAO manipulation warning from ZachXBT - altcoin confidence hit
March 2026 CPI: 3.3% YoY (elevated, up from 2.4%) - constrains Fed easing
FOMC Apr 28-29: 99% probability of hold at 3.50-3.75%
Easter holiday thin liquidity persisting into Monday
analysis.macro_backdrop: Fed funds 3.50-3.75% hold. CPI Mar 2026: +3.3% YoY. FOMC Apr 28-29 with 99% hold probability. No BTC ETF SEC decisions pending next 24h. No major economic data releases April 20-21.
analysis.technical_note: BTC lost $75K support level. Next support ~$72K (Apr 8 levels). Bearish flag on 3D chart targets lower. Resistance now at $75K-$76K. Volume needed to confirm breakdown direction.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bearish: multiple converging negative factors - geopolitical shock (Iran/Hormuz), $75K support broken, bearish 3D chart pattern, DeFi security incident (rsETH), altcoin manipulation concerns. Confidence 0.65 is above 0.50 bot threshold - macro filter WILL bias toward SHORT entries and AGAINST LONG entries this cycle.
